readiness_states.requirements-only: Requirements exist but no executable service procedure is registered.
readiness_states.procedure-draft: A bounded procedure references merged behavior; review, telemetry, alert, escalation, or exercise evidence remains open.
readiness_states.reviewed: The exact procedure version has service-owner and Operations review evidence but has not necessarily been exercised.
readiness_states.exercised: A reviewed procedure has dated execution evidence with residual findings.
readiness_states.pilot-ready: All required runbooks, dashboards, tested alerts, escalation, reconciliation, recovery, and exercises pass the pilot gate.

services.name: Controlled-prototype web application shell

business_checks: Synthetic authenticated Administration request with server-validated context
limitations: No telemetry backend, dashboard, alert route, or tested paging evidence

blockers: No live dashboard or tested alert exists
No named on-call escalation or dated outage exercise exists

services.name: API, identity, tenancy, authority, Party, and Audit runtime

liveness_probes: Compose server healthcheck GET http://localhost:3000/health; liveness only, no database round trip
business_checks: Synthetic session, active-context, permitted-read, denied-read, and tenant non-disclosure checks
limitations: Unexpected errors use bounded stderr logging; structured production telemetry and alerting are absent

blockers: Independent runbook and security review are absent
No authentication/authority SLI dashboard or tested alert exists
No provider-outage, session, authority, or tenant-isolation incident exercise exists

services.name: Composition-owned PostgreSQL and migration runtime

business_checks: Serial migration completion, migration freshness, synthetic authenticated read, and owner integration suites
limitations: No production connection, storage, query, backup, replication, PITR, or failover dashboard

blockers: Production role and RLS topology remains open under RR-007
No backup/restore, PITR, failover, capacity, RPO, or RTO exercise evidence exists
No live database dashboard or tested alert exists

services.name: Catalog and Inventory owner behavior with transactional outbox storage
services.escalation_owner: Domain owners, Data Platform, Security, and Platform Operations

liveness_probes: API and PostgreSQL liveness are prerequisites but do not prove ledger correctness
business_checks: Catalog identity/lifecycle invariants; Inventory conservation/reversal/rebuild; tenant non-disclosure; command receipt and outbox atomicity
limitations: No business-correctness dashboard, repair CLI, delivery worker, delivery-lag alert, or reconciliation job exists

blockers: Catalog bulk import, online numbering workflow, UI, and formal accessibility evidence are absent
Event delivery is separately registered as OPS-SVC-005, but no reviewed cross-service correctness dashboard or delivery-lag alert exists
No reviewed operator repair tool, tested correctness alert, recovery exercise, or final WS2 audit exists

services.name: Controlled-prototype Event Backbone delivery and projections
services.escalation_owner: Platform Operations, Data Platform, Catalog, Inventory, and Security

liveness_probes: Worker process lifecycle plus PostgreSQL reachability; no HTTP health endpoint exists
business_checks: Safe aggregate backlog health, claim lease recovery, bounded retry/dead-letter, authorized replay, consumer-receipt idempotency, Catalog projection freshness, and Inventory balance reconciliation
limitations: Safe aggregate health exists, but no production telemetry backend, dashboard, tested alert route, or multi-replica capacity evidence exists

blockers: Independent Operations review of the exact runbook version is absent
No production SLO, capacity, multi-replica, dashboard, tested alert, or named on-call evidence exists
No dated backlog, dead-letter, replay, projection-rebuild, database-recovery, privacy, or incident-communication exercise exists

deferred_services.name: Catalog and opening-stock import plus online numbering
deferred_services.reason: WS2 PR5 issue #71 has not begun implementation.
deferred_services.admission_trigger: After PR5 merges, register import, partial-failure, reconciliation, malware/resource, and numbering procedures.

deferred_services.name: Product and Inventory web workspace
deferred_services.reason: WS2 PR6 issue #72 has not begun implementation.
deferred_services.admission_trigger: After PR6 merges with formal UI and accessibility evidence, register operator-facing failure and recovery procedures.

deferred_services.name: Offline synchronization and device continuity
deferred_services.reason: Only the Inventory verified-facts boundary exists; WS5 owns transport, leases, devices, tombstones, and reconciliation.
deferred_services.admission_trigger: At WS5 implementation entry, bind runbooks to implemented device/sync telemetry and lab exercises.

deferred_services.name: Payments, stored value, Commerce, POS, fiscalization, and Finance handoff
deferred_services.reason: These first-slice services are not implemented and retain founder/provider/professional gates.
deferred_services.admission_trigger: Register each service only after its owning workstream, provider boundary, commands, telemetry, and reconciliation behavior exist.

deferred_services.name: Backup, restore, disaster recovery, and regional failover
deferred_services.reason: Requirements and local dump examples exist, but no production backup system, protected deletion journal, or restore/failover exercise exists.
deferred_services.admission_trigger: WS7 must register exact backup artifacts, restore tooling, RPO/RTO measurements, tenant/privacy checks, and dated exercises.
